name: AI Tool Leverage Window
description: AI tools lower the cost of prototyping, publishing, and testing a new identity.
life_effect: The era rewards small shipped artifacts more than private preparation.

name: Credential Volatility
description: Old credentials decay faster in a volatile field, while new proof can compound quickly.
life_effect: Waiting for perfect certainty can be more dangerous than a controlled visible test.

name: City Cost Compression
description: High-cost cities compress time, risk tolerance, and self-evaluation.
life_effect: The person may feel late even when they are only under a noisy reference system.

name: Portfolio Work Emergence
description: The environment increasingly allows identity to be built through a portfolio of small outputs.
life_effect: A parallel path can be built before the old path is abandoned.
